response.justification: 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience with direct hits on the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and current work on AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators, which maps tightly to the role's AI agent requirement. Strong track record of ownership, craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based), and polyglot breadth across Java and other languages.
strengths: Direct stack match: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB plus current AI-agent/MCP work
Senior-to-staff level experience with TDD, CI/CD, and architecture ownership
Polyglot background (Java, C/C++, DLang, Python-adjacent) fits secondary stack needs
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin not mentioned; Java exposure is older (robotic arms era)
Located in Lagos, Nigeria — potential timezone/relocation consideration for Berlin-style team

key_factors.factor: Senior full-stack tenure with craftsmanship practices
